mnemonics: UNLOCK: Use Noisy data, Leverage cognates, Optimize with transfer learning, Create synthetic data, Knowledge distillation
keyPoints: Utilizing transfer learning from a high-resource language model
Creating synthetic parallel data through back-translation
Leveraging unsupervised or semi-supervised learning techniques
commonMistakes: Assuming models from high-resource languages will work directly without adaptation
Underestimating the importance of cleaning and pre-processing noisy, available data
Overlooking the potential of similar language families or cognates for bootstrapping
